external.description: The International Monetary Fund (IMF) alerts that advanced AI-driven cyberattacks are a significant risk to global financial stability. The IMF's research indicates that substantial cyber-attack losses could instigate funding problems and destabilize markets. The report emphasizes the need for intensified global cooperation to confront the inevitable breaches. Emerging economies are particularly vulnerable due to their limited defenses against such attacks. The interconnectedness of the global financial system amplifies the potential damage from these AI-enhanced attacks. Advanced AI can swiftly and economically exploit system vulnerabilities, as warned by the IMF. Systemic risks span various sectors, with the possibility of widespread contagion. Reliance on few platforms and cloud providers can expand the consequences of a single breach. Building resilience is crucial to limit the spread and speed up recovery from these incidents. IMF head Kristalina Georgieva highlights global financial systems' unpreparedness for AI-powered cyber threats and calls for global collaboration.

external.description: ABC has filed a legal complaint asserting that the Trump administration is attempting to restrict its constitutionally protected free speech through actions by the Federal Communications Commission (FCC). The dispute centers on ABC’s popular morning talk show, 'The View,' and whether it falls under political equal time rules, which require broadcasters to provide equal airtime to opposing political candidates. ABC argues that 'The View' qualifies as a bona fide news program and has long been exempt from these rules, a status that has existed for over twenty years. The network claims that attempts to narrow this exemption could hinder political discourse at a time when diverse media platforms are already abundant. The filing also references broader concerns over the Trump administration's criticism of media outlets that publish content critical of the president, citing incidents involving ABC's Jimmy Kimmel, The New York Times, and The Wall Street Journal. ABC emphasizes that 'The View' provides a panel of women from different backgrounds, fostering diverse political discussion. The FCC has stated it will review the claim that 'The View' is a bona fide news program. This case highlights ongoing tensions between U.S. media organizations and the government regarding free speech and political commentary on broadcast television.

record.text:
How AI Platforms Are Shaping Interpretations of the Epstein Files

🤖 IA: It's clickbait ⚠️
👥 Usuarios: It's clickbait ⚠️

#conspiracy #ai #epstein 

View full AI summary:

external.description: Following Jeffrey Epstein's death and the release of his alleged suicide note, conspiracy theories surrounding his life and crimes continue to proliferate. The Department of Justice has made over three million documents publicly available, detailing Epstein’s criminal network, but the official interface is cumbersome and difficult to navigate. In response, independent platforms have emerged, using AI to organize and analyze the files. While these tools can facilitate legitimate research, they are increasingly being used by conspiracy theorists to push narratives, a phenomenon termed 'platform conspiracism.' Platforms such as WEBB present themselves as neutral, data-driven research tools, offering features like automated indexing and visual connections, but their creators, including known conspiracy influencers, often use them to amplify misinformation. Other platforms, like Epstein Exposed and Epstein File Search, similarly encourage users to 'conduct their own research,' sometimes blending factual data with unfounded claims linked to movements like QAnon. By presenting manipulated data as authoritative analysis, these tools foster paranoia and reinforce conspiratorial thinking. The expansion of these AI platforms to include other controversial datasets, such as 9/11 and UFO files, further complicates efforts to distinguish between legitimate research and conspiracy. Experts warn that without careful oversight, such platforms can mislead users into accepting speculative connections as factual, highlighting the need for transparency and critical evaluation in AI-assisted research.
external.title: How AI Platforms Are Shaping Interpretations of the Epstein Files

On Google investing in EVE Online and what that really means - a shift in AI training strategy and where to get the data...

images.alt:
Google DeepMind's investment in Fenris Creations (fka: CCP Games) and Eve Online signals a shift in focus for AI training.

AI companies want real-world data, and they want years of it, across tens or hundreds of thousands of people. This isn't just about understanding how to play games, or proving some half-assed notion that games make people into better leaders - it's about understanding intent, why people choose the paths and actions, about incentive and designing systems of coercion, about how people socialise, form groups with common purpose, about betrayal, about subterfuge, about sustainable economies that mirror the real world and how to alter them...the list goes on.

EVE Online is a gold mine for this. It's all of the above and more. Spanning 20+ years of human decision making, the formation of long-term bonds and relationships, of corporate management. The game, often called "spreadsheets in space", is now a training tool for Google AI ambitions.

And this will send out a signal to every other studio just how valuable their player data has become. Especially live-service games with player-driven economics, social dynamics, and branching gameplay that put players into situations with moral consequences.

This isn't anything new; the majority of smaller, addictive games out there right now are designed that way for a reason, they're not complicated, and they follow a pattern.

But this is very different, and it means that players aren't the only ones who are levelling up; the AI will be too.

Be careful of the T&C's you sign up to when you just want to play a video game now.

中イ◯は、食事の影響もかなり受けます。

血流や神経の働きは、
日々の栄養状態で変わるからです。

以下chatGPTにききました↓

糖質や脂質に偏ると
血流が悪くなりやすく、
感覚が鈍くなりがちです。

たんぱく質やビタミン、ミネラルを
しっかり摂れていると、
神経伝達や血流が整い、
細かい感覚を受け取りやすくなります。

特に重要なのは、
・鉄分（酸素を運ぶ）
・マグネシウム（筋肉のゆるみ）
・ビタミンB群（神経の働き）

このあたり。

体が整っていると、
同じ刺激でも反応の深さが変わります。

中イ◯してみたいな〜って方は、
日々の食生活も是非意識してみてください☺️

value.text:
中イ◯は、運動習慣でも変わります。

普段から運動をしている人は、
全身の血流が良くなり、
感覚が伝わりやすい状態になります。

骨盤底筋も固まりにくく、
動きやすい状態になります。

さらに、呼吸も深くなる事で、
リラックスしやすく、感覚に没入しやすい。
逆に運動不足だと、
力みやすくコントロールも効きにくい。

・スクワット
・ストレッチ
・ウォーキング
・深呼吸

このあたりを習慣にするだけでも変わります。

中イ◯は体がしっかりと動ける状態かどうかでも変わる。

中イ◯は、刺激が良ければ起きるものではありません。

脳と自律神経、そして骨盤底筋群がうまく噛み合ったときに、初めて深く反応します。

リラックスしてくると、体の力が抜けて
骨盤まわりも自然とゆるんでいきます。
この状態になると、感覚をしっかり受け取れるようになります。

そこにゆっくりと興奮が重なると、反応が広がっていきます。
逆に力んでしまうと、その反応が止まってしまいます。

大切なのはゆるんだ状態のまま任せることです。

中イ◯は、頑張って起こすものではなく、
ゆるみと反応が重なったときに起きるものです。

ちゃんと理解のあるセラピストを選びましょう☺️

record.bridgyOriginalText:
税込価格の割引より税抜価格の割引の方が安くなりやすい
#数学 #暮らし #物価 #経済

　消費税込みの価格を割引きしてもらうのと、税抜価格を割引してもらって割引後に消費税を加えて支払うのとでは、どちらが得だろうか？

　数式にすると、どちらも同じように見える。

\begin{empheq}[left=\empheqlbrace]{align}
税込価格割引_{計算値}&=(税抜き価格 \times (1+消費税率)) \times (1-割引率) \label{eq:税込価格割引理論式}\\
税抜価格割引_{計算値}&=(税抜き価格 \times (1-割引率)) \times (1+消費税率) \label{eq:税抜価格割引理論式}
\end{empheq}

점심 먹고 다시 작업 시작. 팀원들 AI 작업 현황 파악이 매번 애매했음.
Copilot으로 로그인 기능 어디까지, Cursor로 토큰 만료 처리 왜 바꿨는지 등.
`/AI업무보고` 한 줄이면 AI 대화 내용 기반으로 보고서 딱 나옴. `install.sh` 설치도 간편함.
https://github.com/jyoung9154/AIAgent_Report #AI개발 #팀관리 #광고

아침에 어제 AI랑 작업한 거 되돌아보는데, 예전엔 일지 직접 쓰느라 아침부터 귀찮았음.
로그인 기능 뭘 요청했고, 세션 관리는 왜 고쳤는지, JWT 발급 어디까지 됐는지 일일이 다 정리했어야 했음.
지금은 `/AI업무보고` 한 줄 치면 그 모든 게 자동으로 보고서에 나옴.
https://github.com/jyoung9154/AIAgent_Report #개발자 #오픈소스 #광고

오늘 퇴근 전에 AI랑 작업한 거 정리하는데, `/AI업무보고` 한 줄로 끝냈음.
내가 뭘 요청했고, 왜 그 코드를 바꿨고, 내일 뭐 할지 다 나옴.
install.sh 딱 한 번 실행하니 쓰는 AI 에이전트 다 잡아주고 바로 보고서 만들어줌.
https://github.com/jyoung9154/AIAgent_Report #개발일지 #오픈소스 #광고
